item.title: 代理编排：企业人工智能组织面临的是部署问题，而不是平台问题——而且大多数都在调用聊天机器人代理
item.summary: Across 101 enterprises, agent orchestration is consolidating onto model-provider platforms — Anthropic’s Claude leads by a wide margin — chosen for the gravity of the underlying model and judged on reliable multi-step execution. But the ambition runs well ahead of the reality: most deployed “agents” are still chatbot w
